status: DRAFT -- pre-registration only; NOT frozen; no tag/manifest-hash-lock/confirmatory run authorized

disjoint_from.note: confirmatory base 1200000 is disjoint from the A-line confirmatory block (900000), every B development block used so far (dev-map base 0..23, P2.4c controls 1000 / power 2000, P2.4d controls 3000 / power 4000, replication 700000), and all smoke/test seed ranges (< 100000).

grid.control_scenarios_note: controls are evaluated over ALL 6 stress scenarios, INCLUDING label_noise and few_epochs, even though those two are excluded from the primary positive-power envelope.
grid.secondary_note: pure_conditional reported over all scenarios; NOT gating.
grid.excluded_note: development-informed exclusion: heavy label noise (~0.5 seed-variable primary power) and very-short records (<8 epochs/condition -> NEED_MORE_LABELS eligibility). Controls are still evaluated in these scenarios.

scenario_configs_note: EXACT simulator knobs (cfg_* -> SimConfig; rest -> make_paired_target). The dry-run runner asserts these match csc.mininfo.run_b3_p23.SCENARIOS byte-for-byte; any drift fails closed.

pass_criteria.type: CONJUNCTION -- ALL must hold on the unseen block; any single failure => confirmatory FAILS
pass_criteria.C1_guards: missing_pair = 0 AND unequal_epochs_extreme = 0 false confirmations (all budgets)
pass_criteria.C2_control_typeI: every control kind x budget (over all 6 scenarios pooled per kind x budget, n=288): Clopper-Pearson one-sided upper (0.95) <= 0.05. POINTWISE by the pre-declared reporting unit (kind x budget); the headline is a conjunction of pointwise gates, NOT a simultaneous familywise confidence interval over all cells.
pass_criteria.C3_no_hot_cell: no scenario x kind x budget cell (n=48) has >= 6/48 false confirmations; AND no kind x budget has MULTIPLE (>=2) scenario cells at >= 3/48 (kind-level leakage).
pass_criteria.C4_primary_power: for EACH primary positive kind in {paired_concept, paired_concept_plus_cov} AND EACH budget m in {20,30}, pooled over the 4 primary scenarios: Clopper-Pearson one-sided lower (0.95) >= 0.60. ADDITIONALLY: no primary positive scenario x kind x budget cell may have point power < 0.50.
pass_criteria.C5_no_silent_failure: 0 sampler failures; null-invalid fraction within cap; all states in the 5-state set {CONCEPT_CONFIRMED, NO_CONCEPT_EVIDENCE_AFTER_PAIR_AUDIT, NEED_MORE_LABELS, INVALID_PAIR_STRUCTURE, UNIDENTIFIABLE}.
pass_criteria.C6_independent_verification: an independent red-team re-aggregation reproduces the verdict without correction.

cp_semantics_note: All Clopper-Pearson intervals are POINTWISE at the declared reporting unit (kind x budget for controls; kind x budget pooled over primary scenarios for positives). C3's scenario-cell hard flags are an ADDITIONAL safety gate, not a familywise CI.
